meaning: adj.有蹄的,蹄形状的,装蹄的
examples: We hoofed it all the way to 42nd Street.
Dr Bracke also looked at other hoofed animals, such as deer.
Wolves depend on a variety of large ungulates (hoofed animals) for food.
De Niese hoofed her way through as if she had been practicing for weeks.
The exceptions, such as hoofed animals and birds have all descended from five-fingered ancestors.
